subparts.text: Describe the importance of electric vehicle.
Discuss the cooling system in an automobile.
Explain braking system in an Automobile.
Write a short note on Automatic Transmission System.
Describe the function and benefits of overdrive in a vehicle's transmission.
Differentiate between mechanical and hydraulic brake.

questions.question_text: How do manifold systems help in distributing air and fuel to the engine?
Explain how electric vehicle differs from traditional internal combustion engine vehicles in detail.
Explain the role of a clutch, gearbox, and rear axle in the power transmission system of a vehicle.
Describe the working principle of a centrifugal clutch with its advantages and disadvantages and where it is typically used.
Explain the advantages and disadvantages of using a sliding mesh gearbox and modern gearboxes.
Explain semi-automatic transmission. How does it combine features of both manual and automatic transmissions?
How does the suspension system affect ride comfort, handling, and stability of a vehicle? Explain it in detail.
Explain the key difference between mechanical and hydraulic brake systems.
